manualFeedback.summary: Manual retest confirmed the previous camera, visibility, and magenta presentation issues are resolved enough for a first playable. The player can understand the objective, move, recover three targets, read progress, and recognize Job Complete without visible runtime instability.

uxChangesApplied: Added HUD controls text: WASD / Arrow Keys: Move and E: Recover nearby target.
Added Recover labels and marker spheres above all three recovery targets.
Added nearest-target highlight that changes the marker and label to Press E: Recover.
Changed recovered targets to green/dimmed visual state and Recovered label.
Kept Job Complete visible in the progress UI after all three recoveries.
Switched generated materials to URP-compatible shaders to remove magenta/pink missing-shader rendering.
Reframed the main camera with an orthographic centered view so the player and recovery targets are visible.
Added a player marker/label and enlarged target markers/labels for readability.
Added a simple objective banner separate from the controls text.

reviewItems.question: Player can understand what to do.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed the objective and controls are understandable after the UX fixes.

reviewItems.question: Movement can be judged.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed the player is visible and movement is acceptable for a first playable.

reviewItems.question: Camera framing supports play.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed the camera now frames the player and recovery targets.

reviewItems.question: Three recovery targets are identifiable.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed all three targets are visible and distinguishable.

reviewItems.question: Recoverable state is visually clear.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed the nearby interaction state and Press E prompt are understandable.

reviewItems.question: E-key recovery response is satisfying.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed E-key recovery response is sufficient for this first playable.

reviewItems.question: Progress UI is readable.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed recovery progress is understandable.

reviewItems.question: Job Complete is clear.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed the completion state is recognizable.

reviewItems.question: Labels, colors, and distance cues are readable.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed the previous invisible/magenta presentation problem is resolved for first-playable purposes.

reviewItems.question: No errors, freezes, or abnormal behavior.
reviewItems.finding: User reported no runtime errors, freezes, or abnormal behavior.

reviewItems.question: Overall acceptable as a first playable.
reviewItems.finding: Manual retest confirmed this is acceptable as a first playable: not a finished game, but the core loop can be understood and played.

reviewItems.question: Remaining improvements are future scope.
reviewItems.finding: Art, sound, recovery presentation, tutorial flow, rewards, and the next-job/company loop remain future improvements, not blockers for this first playable.

manualAcceptanceCriteria.summary: Within 3 seconds of starting play, the player understands the objective and controls.
manualAcceptanceCriteria.note: Manual retest confirmed the objective banner and controls text are clear enough for the first playable.

manualAcceptanceCriteria.summary: All three recovery targets are visually distinguishable on screen.
manualAcceptanceCriteria.note: Manual retest confirmed all three recovery targets are visible and distinguishable with labels/markers.

manualAcceptanceCriteria.summary: The target that can be recovered near the player is visually distinguished.
manualAcceptanceCriteria.note: Manual retest confirmed the nearby interaction state and Press E prompt are understandable.

manualAcceptanceCriteria.summary: Recovering all targets clearly transitions the job to complete.
manualAcceptanceCriteria.note: Manual retest confirmed progress UI and Job Complete are understandable.

manualAcceptanceCriteria.summary: Manual play remains free of visible errors, freezes, or abnormal behavior.
manualAcceptanceCriteria.note: User reported no visible errors, freezes, or abnormal behavior. Automated console verification is tracked separately.

remainingLimitations: This is not a finished game.
Art, sound, and recovery presentation remain placeholder-level.
Tutorial flow is still simple instructional UI rather than a full game-like onboarding sequence.
Next-job, reward, and company management loops are not implemented yet.
remainingPlayabilityIssues: This is not a finished game.
Art, sound, and recovery presentation remain placeholder-level.
Tutorial flow is still simple instructional UI rather than a full game-like onboarding sequence.
Next-job, reward, and company management loops are not implemented yet.
nextAction: Treat this build as a Human Playable First Build Candidate and continue with art, sound, tutorial, reward, and next-job loop work before any public release claim.
